title: Born To Survive
description: Unleash the thrill of battle with this modpack! Designed to amplify your gaming experience with the Epic Fight mod, it’s all about transforming your game into an exhilarating adventure. Dive in, and let the fun begin!
body:
Unleash the thrill of battle with this modpack! Designed to amplify your gaming experience with the Epic Fight mod, it’s all about transforming your game into an exhilarating adventure. Dive in, and let the fun begin!

**Notice**: If it crashed, try remove the `options.txt` from modpack profile. This reset the settings to default, but you will have to reconfigure some key binds by yourself since it conflicted. 
You can also try making a backup of the `option.txt` and replace it when you be able to launch the game.
